purpose: Record decisions that currently shape the CLI harness implementation and decisions that must be resolved before crossing a new runtime boundary.
usage_rules: Do not use this file as a roadmap or implementation tracker.
Record only decisions that still affect current or paused implementation work.
Separate settled current decisions from pending decisions.
Move completed implementation detail into the implementation archive rather than leaving stale state here.
Do not record placeholder decisions just to satisfy the context compiler.

current_decisions.decision: Project Manager config should not expose tool permissions while the PM role has no tool surface.
current_decisions.rationale: For the current PM route, absence is cleaner than an empty permissions object. Tool declarations should appear when a role actually needs a governed tool boundary.

current_decisions.decision: Role/config schemas may lock fixed role identity and required runtime inputs, but should not lock the model name to a single provider-specific literal.
current_decisions.rationale: The harness is intended to remain provider-aware but not semantically shaped around one OpenAI model string. Provider/model compatibility belongs in runtime/provider policy, not role identity.

current_decisions.decision: Examples and templates are authoring artifacts; live runtime JSON documents are runtime artifacts.
current_decisions.rationale: $schema may be present in examples/templates for IDE and developer validation. Runtime outputs should be validated by the runtime contract and should not be treated as invalid merely because authoring fixtures carry authoring metadata.

current_decisions.decision: The current implementation slice is Pydantic/model cleanup plus context compiler readiness for a real PM call, but the project spec should describe the intended CLI harness as a whole.
current_decisions.rationale: The PM call needs enough invariant context to evaluate whether the first slice preserves the full harness thesis rather than merely satisfying a narrow scaffold test.

notes.note: No known failures are currently recorded. Do not create fake known-failure entries to satisfy context plumbing.

Implementation plan/tracker contracts were not included in this fill pass, so those files should be generated only after their schemas/templates are available or their live shape is explicitly chosen.
